title: daucus broteri var. bicolor
intro: Daucus broteri var. bicolor, also known as the multiflorus carrot, is a variety of wild carrot plant that is native to the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and fever. The health benefits of Daucus broteri var. bicolor include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Daucus broteri var. bicolor include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties and health benefits.
